sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46380" key="zutourgei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῡτουργεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n46380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">brewery, PPetr.ined.</tr_>iii No. <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Oxy.:124" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">124</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii B.C.)</date>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> indicem.</sense> </entryFree>
